LanguageData.LetterTributeCollectorArrival:
An enclave representative from {FACTION_name} is approaching.\n\nThey will accept any prisoners and resources you offer as tribute. The one who gives over the tribute will receive {FACTION_royalFavorLabel} for supporting the enclave.
You can expect an enclave representative to arrive roughly twice per year as long as you are not enemies with {FACTION_name}.
